cards.prompt: custom InfoAttribute(Author ctor, Version named): GetCustomAttribute печатает Author и Version?
cards.code: using System; using System.Reflection; [AttributeUsage(AttributeTargets.Class)] class InfoAttribute : Attribute { public string Author; public int Version; public InfoAttribute(string a){Author=a;} } [Info("ada", Version=2)] class Widget {} var a = typeof(Widget).GetCustomAttribute<InfoAttribute>(); Console.WriteLine(a.Author); Console.WriteLine(a.Version);

cards.prompt: [Tag("api", Cached=true)]: positional Name vs named Cached восстановленные reflection-ом?
cards.code: using System; using System.Reflection; class TagAttribute : Attribute { public string Name; public bool Cached; public TagAttribute(string name){Name=name;} } [Tag("api", Cached=true)] class Svc {} var a = typeof(Svc).GetCustomAttribute<TagAttribute>(); Console.WriteLine($"positional Name={a.Name}"); Console.WriteLine($"named Cached={a.Cached}");

cards.prompt: Тип без атрибута: GetCustomAttribute == null? GetCustomAttributes(false).Length?
cards.code: using System; using System.Reflection; class MarkAttribute : Attribute {} class Plain {} Console.WriteLine(typeof(Plain).GetCustomAttribute<MarkAttribute>() == null); Console.WriteLine(typeof(Plain).GetCustomAttributes(false).Length);
